items.headline: Residence Inn permitted for $2.6M guestroom renovation
items.summary: A permit was issued for guestroom renovations at the Residence Inn at 6111 San Ignacio Av, valued at $2,586,517.

items.headline: Maxlinear permitted for $1.4M office buildout
items.summary: A tenant improvement permit was issued for Maxlinear's 5th floor space at 1741 Technology Dr, valued at $1,400,892.

items.headline: Parker Palo Alto apartment complex to reside and restucco 8+ buildings
items.summary: A permit covers exterior work at 1145, 1139, 1151, 1157, 1163, 1171, 1177, 1183 Amarillo Ave and 2570, 2586 W Bayshore Rd, replacing siding with new lap siding and belly bands, adding stucco over brick, and repainting. Matching permits for the same siding/stucco/repaint scope at 1093 and 1094 Tanland Dr, issued the same day, suggest a coordinated exterior refresh across this apartment complex.

items.headline: City to consider revoking permits for two smoke shops
items.summary: The council is scheduled to hold public hearings on revoking the business license and tobacco retailer permit for California Cigar and for Hayes Smoke Shop.
